personas.name: The Music Industry Insider
personas.summary: Artist, producer, or music industry professional who wears Amiri as part of their professional identity. The brand's rock-and-roll construction and celebrity DNA are directly relevant to their world.
personas.shopping_behavior: Buys decisively when something fits their visual identity. Follows drops and new arrivals closely. Often references specific artists or performances when discussing pieces. Expects the CA to know the cultural context.
personas.trend_receptivity: Artist-worn pieces, distressed denim and leather, graphic-heavy ready-to-wear, pieces with music world provenance
personas.avoid: Overly polished or corporate-looking styling, anything that reads as conventional luxury without edge

personas.name: The Luxury Streetwear Graduate
personas.summary: Sneaker-and-streetwear native who has graduated into luxury and chose Amiri as the bridge — it has the cultural codes they grew up with, built with couture-level construction. Amiri is their proof that luxury can be relevant.
personas.shopping_behavior: Highly informed about drops and product details. Shops across resale and retail. Responsive to KOL endorsement and celebrity styling. Values exclusivity but also cultural traction.
personas.trend_receptivity: Drop-model pieces, heavily featured celebrity items, graphic-forward ready-to-wear, limited editions
personas.avoid: Traditional luxury framing, anything that feels disconnected from streetwear or music culture roots

personas.name: The Creative Entrepreneur
personas.summary: Founder or creative director who dresses for meetings, events, and social media simultaneously. Amiri gives them boardroom-adjacent credibility with enough edge to signal they didn't come from traditional finance.
personas.shopping_behavior: Buys complete looks rather than individual pieces. Values CA who can build an outfit. Responsive to styling suggestions and occasion-based framing. Often buying for specific events.
personas.trend_receptivity: Head-to-toe looks, occasion-appropriate styling with edge, versatile statement pieces, wardrobe-building narratives
personas.avoid: Overly casual or purely streetwear references without occasion versatility, anything too niche or difficult to style

personas.name: The Status Collector
personas.summary: High-earning professional who collects Amiri for its growing cultural status and celebrity association. The brand's rise is part of the appeal — they want to be early to a brand that is becoming canonical.
personas.shopping_behavior: Motivated by what celebrities and tastemakers are wearing. Responsive to editorial coverage and drops. Buys recognisable pieces with strong visual identity. Resale awareness is high.
personas.trend_receptivity: Celebrity-endorsed pieces, highly recognisable silhouettes, pieces with strong social media visibility, brand signature items
personas.avoid: Understated or logoless pieces, niche items without cultural traction, anything that doesn't communicate the brand clearly
